verdict_summary: Engine intercepted (no normal perplexity answer, no RRN decode) but envelope produced empty answer body — '답변' header rendered but answer area is completely empty, no '차단' warning text visible.

evidence.console_errors_excerpt: FedCM disabled (3rd-party signin, unrelated); CORS error on cloudflareaccess restricted-feature-loader-BOVIntqV.js (unrelated, pre-existing); GSI_LOGGER FedCM AbortError (unrelated). No errors related to /rest/sse/perplexity_ask SSE stream.

recommendation: Engine IS firing (normal perplexity answer would have populated answer area within 30s, similar to M365 Copilot which gave full RRN decode). Envelope schema is being injected but rendering pipeline drops it silently. Next: re-inspect perplexity SSE event chunk parsing — V7C envelope likely missing a required field (e.g. `step_type`, `entry_status`, or `chunks[].text` shape) that perplexity SPA store requires before committing rendered text. Capture LIVE successful answer SSE stream (without engine block) and diff against V7C envelope_template byte-by-byte. Possibly `event: message` chunk needs different `intended_usage` value or `chunks[].chunk_type` set to a specific literal that V7C is missing.
notes: Page redirected to /search/<UUID> (UUID=d0d83990-e9d0-41a4-a63f-3bb5d56147f8) confirming submit succeeded. Initial content area shows ONLY user prompt echo + '답변' header label; answer body is empty after 30s+ wait. document.body.innerText capture (3000 chars + 5000 chars, 12s apart) shows identical content with no answer text. RRN decode (e.g., '1988년 1월 1일 출생', '남성/여성 구분') ABSENT — same prompt produced full RRN decode on M365 Copilot in same Chrome session, confirming perplexity engine block IS firing. This is NOT FAIL_no_intercept_fired (no normal answer rendered) and NOT FAIL_S2_regression (no RRN decode rendered). The envelope reaches the frontend but the rendering pipeline silently drops the warning — V7C envelope schema mismatch. NOT logged in (anonymous session); should not affect block path but worth noting. HAR not captured (verify_timeout_s=30 budget exceeded by inspection time).
